_comment: GEO content matrix backlog for manwithamop.co. Read + updated by the /geo-blog skill. After a post goes live, append its slug to publishedSlugs. Pilot city is built first; velocity is capped tighter than Aeopic to protect the smaller domain.

cities.name: Cypress
cities.hook: ZIP 77433 was the most-moved-into ZIP in America in 2025 — move-in cleans + builder dust in Bridgeland, Marvida, Dunham Pointe; Towne Lake Boardwalk to broken-in Coles Crossing

cities.name: Katy
cities.hook: Two markets in one: established Cinco Ranch/Grand Lakes south of I-10 vs hot new-build ZIP 77493 (Elyson, Cane Island, Sunterra); HOA/resale market makes move-out cleans inspection-grade work

cities.name: Hockley
cities.hook: Country + new builds on 77447 — home sales jumped 40%+ in 2024 (Dellrose, Cypress Green, Jubilee) next to acreage/farm properties with gravel-drive dust and earned mudrooms

cities.name: Magnolia
cities.hook: Acreage in the pines — spring pine pollen, big custom homes (High Meadow Ranch, Mostyn Manor), plus fast growth along FM 1488/Aggie Expressway (Audubon)

cities.name: Tomball
cities.hook: Old town + new growth: real downtown w/ railroad depot & German festivals, Lakewood Forest wooded homes with decades of character vs new Northpointe builds off the 249 Tollway

cities.name: Conroe
cities.hook: Boomtown + lake life: county seat doubled since 2010 (Grand Central Park, Harper's Preserve) and Lake Conroe rentals need fast five-star turnovers (April Sound)
